title: Daphnis and Chloe
actors: Apollon Marsyas, Loucy Matli, Marika Raftopoulou
plot: Lamonas the shepherd finds a boy sucking milk from the teats of a goat. He calls him Dafnis and takes him as his own child. At the same time, Dryantas, another shepherd, comes across a little girl whom he calls her Chloe.
